credentials.name: serviceA
credentials.label: Credentials for Service A
credentials.description: Optional description of the service using credentials

secret.name: password
secret.label: Your Service1 password
secret.description: This needs to be a strong password

credentials.name: serviceB
credentials.label: Another service
credentials.description: Optional description of the service using credentials

secret.name: api_token
secret.label: API Token
secret.description: This is the API token for service B
